---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement for Curve Explorer Pro
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement, feature-request
assignees: ''
---

## Feature Description
A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to see.

## Problem or Use Case
What problem does this feature solve? What use case does it address?

## Proposed Solution
Describe how you envision this feature working.

## Alternative Solutions
Have you considered any alternative approaches?

## Educational Value
How would this feature benefit students, educators, or learners?

## Technical Considerations
Any thoughts on implementation, performance, or compatibility?

## Examples or Mockups
If applicable, provide examples, sketches, or mockups of the feature.

## Priority
How important is this feature to you?
- [ ] Critical - Blocks my usage
- [ ] High - Would significantly improve my experience
- [ ] Medium - Nice to have
- [ ] Low - Minor enhancement

## Additional Context
Add any other context, screenshots, or examples about the feature request.
